      java.util.List<CompositeDescription> LookupService.getAllDescriptions​(java.lang.String conceptId, EnumLangRefset enumLangRefset)
      Returns the list of descriptions including Fully specified names (FSN).
      java.util.Set<CompositeDescription> SearchService.search​(java.lang.String matchTerm, boolean groupByConcept, java.lang.String refsetId, java.util.List<java.lang.String> parentIdList, boolean excludeConcept)
      Searches given term/text or concept id in SNOMED CT repository.
      java.util.Set<CompositeDescription> SearchService.search​(java.lang.String matchTerm, int returnLimit, boolean groupByConcept, java.lang.String refsetId, java.util.List<java.lang.String> parentIdList, boolean excludeConcept)
      Searches limited best matching terms for given term/text or concept iD in SNOMED CT repository.
      java.util.Set<CompositeDescription> SearchService.search​(java.lang.String matchTerm, EnumState enumState, int returnLimit, boolean groupByConcept, java.lang.String refsetId, java.util.List<java.lang.String> parentIdList, boolean excludeConcept)
      Searches given term/text or concept id in the SNOMED CT repository based on provided component state (active, inactive, both).

      Searches given term/text or concept id in the SNOMED CT repository based on provided component state, semantic tag.
